{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032302084443F1474365F113F95EDE\"}"},"total":493},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579988995490317080","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本一等一的好书。不是科技小白文科生写的科技文。作者科学体系技术知识相当扎实。涉猎广泛。读起来很有趣味。不会有理科生读文科生写科技文的尴尬感觉。作者不应该只是二级。顾忌是某个大神的小号。推荐阅读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764855873,"group_id":"7567394414805388312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是华夏文明的白细胞。一切以文明和族群延续为最高价值标准。反集权，反奴役，反剥削。追寻“人人如龙，天下为公”的华夏文明底核。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0JebO2LjGeuwwZLaADaQJBf+9oZhPX3iiZC4GS9KJw9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b726df6d873041d09ed02862ab89f1e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776795242\u0026x-signature=jE%2F2Jo35cDtti9%2BlMRupwdidBCc%3D","user_id":"4168997842984123","user_name":"爱吃西瓜的宋东井"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4168997842984123","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7567394414805388312","book_info":{"abstract":"主角吴理，偶然得到次空间工厂，利用工厂控制中枢的大脑增强功能，手搓了固态电池……因为有挂，所以有房、有车、有钱、有爱、有科技，还有……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/49fd5b8c090b2a6f83d346db1ca2da3e","author":"取个名很难啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7567394414805388312","book_name":"从固态电池开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\
